changelog: **Manifest seeder crash** (`src/background/manifest-seeder.ts`): resolved `TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'length')` in `seedFromManifest` by updating lingering camelCase accesses (`p.name`, `p.scripts`, `p.configs`, `c.key`, `c.seedId`, `dependencyProject.scripts`, `dependencyScript.seedId`) to PascalCase, matching the migrated manifest shape.
**Root `readme.md`**: pinned install instructions and tags to `v2.232.0`.
